description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a matte yellow exterior, featuring a large, stylized 'M' logo in silver and black on the front, which is characteristic of Monster Energy drinks. The can has a black top rim and a seamless, smooth metallic body. Below the logo, the words 'Monster Energy' and 'Ultra Citron' are visible, indicating the flavor and brand. The can's surface is mostly yellow, with some subtle graphic elements and text wrapping around the sides. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, designed to be eye-catching and easily recognizable in urban environments.
description: A tall, matte yellow can with a bold silver and black 'M' logo and 'Monster Energy Ultra Citron' branding. The can features a smooth metallic finish and black top rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large silver and black 'M' logo and clear 'Monster Energy Ultra Citron' text.
description_view_1: Side view with partial 'M' logo visible and less readable text, mostly yellow surface.
description_view_2: Angled view with the 'M' logo and some branding text visible, emphasizing the can's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Rear view with minimal branding, mostly yellow surface and a faint outline of the logo.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, stylized 'M' logo in silver and black is prominently displayed on the front of the can.
attribute_flavor_indication: The text 'Ultra Citron' below the logo and the yellow color indicate a citrus flavor.
